news.headline: Agilent's CEO and CFO to present at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Jan. 14, 2025, 9:45am Pacific time. $A.
news.summary: Agilent Technologies Inc. revealed that CEO Padraig McDonnell and CFO Bob McMahon are set to participate in the 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference in San Francisco on Tuesday, Jan. 14, 2025, at 9:45 a.m. Pacific time. The event can be accessed through a live audio webcast and replay on the Agilent Investor Relations website. Agilent Technologies Inc. (NYSE: A) is a prominent player in the analytical and clinical laboratory industry.

news.headline: Range Equity Management, Oaktree, and Lodging Capital Partners secure $99M loan for Viewline Resort and Wildwood Hotel.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, an affiliate overseen by Range Equity Management, L.P. ("REM"), Lodging Capital Partners ("LCP"), and funds under the management of Oaktree Capital Management, L.P. ("Oaktree") have provided a loan worth $99 million. This loan is backed by the 254-key Viewline Resort along with the 158-key...

news.headline: FirstEnergy Foundation donates $20,000 to West Virginia agencies; each recipient receives surprise $6,650 to support community services.
news.summary: Three nonprofit organizations that serve communities within Mon Power's service area in FAIRMONT, W.Va., were surprised with $6,650 donations each from Mon Power, a subsidiary of FirstEnergy Corp (NYSE: FE). This act of generosity took place on Dec. 19, 2024, highlighting the utility company's commitment to supporting essential services in the region.

news.headline: Stifel upgrades rating on DT Midstream to Buy, raises price target to $106 citing growth potential, EBITDA over $1 billion.
news.summary: Financial expert Selman Akyol from Stifel has upgraded DT Midstream, Inc. (NYSE:DTM) from Hold to Buy status, while also increasing the price target significantly from $89 to $106. Akyol views the recent dip in stock price as a favorable opportunity for potential investors. DT Midstream's strategic move in acquiring a natural gas pipeline positions the company as a prominent player in the natural gas infrastructure sector. This acquisition is forecasted to boost DTM's EBITDA to over $1 billion and broaden its customer base, potentially prompting a credit rating improvement to investment grade by S&P. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Merck's two-drug regime for HIV meets goals in Phase 3 trials, includes doravirine/islatravir (DOR/ISL). Non-inferior to bART and BIC/FTC/TAF.
news.summary: Merck & Co Inc (NYSE:MRK) recently announced top-line results from two important Phase 3 trials involving a doravirine/islatravir (DOR/ISL) two-drug regimen for adults with HIV-1 infection. The trials assessed patients who were already virologically suppressed on various antiretroviral therapy regimens, including baseline antiretroviral therapy (bART) and Bictegravir/Emtricitabine/Tenofovir Alafenamide (BIC/FTC/TAF). In open-label trial MK-8591A-051, DOR/ISL proved to be just as effective as bART, while in the double-blind trial MK-8591A-052, it was shown to be non-inferior to BIC/FTC/TAF. For a more detailed report, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Willis Lease Finance Corporation purchases 9 advanced GTF engines for Airbus A320 Family, valued at $200 million each.
news.summary: In Coconut Creek, Florida, on December 19, 2024, Willis Lease Finance Corporation (NASDAQ: WLFC), a leading lessor of commercial aircraft engines and provider of global aviation service operations, announced a significant transaction with Pratt & Whitney. This transaction involves the purchase of nine new PW1133G-JM aircraft engines, with all acquisitions scheduled to be completed by December 31, 2024. Pratt & Whitney's GTF engines offer up to 20% greater fuel efficiency compared to older engines, are approved for operation using 50% sustainable aviation fuel ("SAF"), and have been effectively tested with 100% SAF. Valued at around $200 million according to Pratt & Whitney's 2024 list prices, this deal marks a substantial advancement in delivering modern and sought-after engines to airlines for the long term. It is important to note that Pratt & Whitney operates as an RTX business on the NYSE under the ticker symbol RTX.

news.headline: Private credit aims to mimic traditional banking, with $850B in assets.
Karen R. Saunders appointed to Heritage Financial Corporation Board of Directors and subsidiary board.
news.summary: In Olympia, Washington, on December 19, 2024, Heritage Financial Corporation (Nasdaq: HFWA) announced the addition of Karen R. Saunders to its Board of Directors. Concurrently, Ms. Saunders also joined the Board of Directors of Heritage's wholly-owned subsidiary.

news.headline: Ownership change announced at 800NoCuffs, largest private DUI defense law firm in California, after 20+ years. Darren Kavinoky retiring.
news.summary: Located in Encino, California, on December 19, 2024, the Meehan Law Firm, operating as 800NoCuffs, has revealed a shift in ownership. As the leading private DUI defense law firm in California for two decades, the firm's founder, Darren Kavinoky, has decided to retire from the realm of criminal law.

news.headline: Maropost's Marketing Cloud named "Easiest to Use" in G2 Winter Reports, excelling across seven categories and 71 reports.
news.summary: In an effort to excel in marketing automation for mid-market businesses, Maropost Marketing Cloud has been recognized across seven categories and featured in 71 reports. The company, based in Toronto, was identified as a consistent "High Performer" and stood out in G2's Winter 2025 Reports for being labeled as the "Easiest to Use."

news.headline: NACD New England awards Cabot Corp. and King Arthur Baking as best public and private company boards in 2025.
news.summary: The New England Chapter of the National Association of Corporate Directors has revealed the recipients of its 2025 "Directors of the Year" award and recognized outstanding public and private company boards as the "Boards of the Year."

news.headline: Avendra International acquires Quantum Cost Consultancy Group to enhance global procurement services for various client industries.
news.summary: In Philadelphia, Aramark (NYSE: ARMK), a renowned company in food and facilities management, revealed that Avendra International has purchased the Quantum Cost Consultancy Group. This acquisition bolsters Aramark's status as a top global professional procurement and supply chain services provider for various clients like hotels, hospitality establishments, healthcare facilities, and educational institutions across the globe. Quantum boasts an impressive customer spend of almost half a billion dollars.

news.headline: Point-of-Care Diagnostics market to grow at 10.2% CAGR through 2029 with advances in AI, Lab-on-a-Chip.
news.summary: Technological innovations, such as Artificial Intelligence (AI), Lab-on-a-Chip, and other emerging technologies, are fueling a revolution in Point-of-Care Diagnostics. The transformation is characterized by improvements in speed, accuracy, and clinical efficiency. A recent study by BCC Research reveals that these advancements are reshaping the landscape of point-of-care diagnostics. The study, focusing on technologies in this field, highlights the significant impact of these developments. This shift is taking place in Boston, where the changes are particularly notable. The research indicates that the field is experiencing rapid evolution, catering to the demand for quick and precise diagnostic solutions. The report underlines that these technological strides are enhancing healthcare outcomes and patient care. Boston, being at the forefront of this transformation, is witnessing a surge in innovative diagnostic solutions. The study emphasizes the crucial role of AI, Lab-on-a-Chip, and similar technologies in this progression. Overall, these advancements are driving improvements in point-of-care diagnostics, setting new standards for efficiency and accuracy in clinical settings.

news.headline: Dow Jones and S&P 500 stage recovery, Palantir and Nvidia aim to break losing streaks. Market updates on telehealth trends.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones and S&P 500 made efforts to recover on the stock market. Palantir Technologies and Nvidia are aiming to break their recent losing streaks. Palantir climbed while a telehealth company overtook its position.

news.headline: Garrett Moran appointed as Year Up United National Board Chair, after serving as COO at Blackstone.
news.summary: Garrett Moran has been appointed as the new Chairman of the Board for the workforce development organization Year Up United. Prior to this role, Moran led the Governor's Workforce Council in Connecticut. The announcement was made on December 19, 2024, in New York. Moran succeeds the Immediate Past Chair in this key position. This change signifies a shift in leadership with Moran taking the helm to drive the organization forward.

news.headline: Local broadband providers use Calix SmartTown to reconnect Hurricane Helene-affected communities, including French Broad EMC and Riverwave Broadband.
news.summary: Calix, Inc. (NYSE: CALX) in San Jose, California acknowledges their customers’ efforts in supporting Hurricane Helene-affected communities through the utilization of the Calix Broadband Platform. This platform includes a wide range of Wi-Fi systems and Calix SmartTown® community Wi-Fi. By leveraging the capabilities of the Calix Platform, broadband service providers like French Broad Electric Membership Corporation, Riverwave Broadband, and Clearwave Fiber were able to provide assistance in the affected areas.

news.headline: Silicon battery market growth as technology advances for higher energy density in EVs and electronics.
news.summary: A report titled "Silicon Battery Market - A Global and Regional Analysis" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The silicon battery market is currently witnessing strong growth, driven by technological advancements aiming to fulfill increasing requirements for higher energy density and enhanced performance in different sectors such as electric vehicles (EVs), consumer electronics, and renewable energy. The analysis covers the period from 2024 to 2034 and focuses on applications, products, and regions worldwide. This market trend showcases significant potential, with key emphasis on the growing demand for innovative battery solutions.

news.headline: Peachtree Immediate Care opens 2 new locations in Columbus and Valdosta, expanding to 55 locations in Georgia and 1 in Alabama.
news.summary: Expanding its reach in Columbus and Valdosta areas, Urgent Care brand Peachtree Immediate Care has seen significant growth. This Georgia-based network, in partnership with Emory Healthcare, has solidified its position as the largest urgent care provider in the region. As of December 19, 2024, Peachtree Immediate Care boasts a network that includes Valdosta and Columbus in Georgia, as well as Phenix City in Alabama. This strategic expansion demonstrates the brand's commitment to offering convenient and comprehensive healthcare services to a growing number of patients in these areas.

news.headline: Dalfen Industrial buys 219,123 sq ft warehouse in New Jersey, expanding its Northeast portfolio.
news.summary: In Philadelphia on December 19, 2024, Dalfen Industrial, a leading privately owned industrial real estate company, revealed the acquisition of a 219,123-square-foot, Class A industrial facility in Lumberton, New Jersey. Situated in Burlington County, this off-market purchase marks a significant addition to their portfolio.

news.headline: WEC Energy Group sets pricing terms for upsized cash tender offer of $400 million in aggregate principal amount.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, in Milwaukee, WEC Energy Group, Inc. revealed the pricing details of the enlarged cash tender offer for $400 million in total principal amount, termed as the Aggregate Maximum Principal Amount. This offer was announced by WEC Energy Group (NYSE: WEC).

news.headline: Global public health advocates demand Hearst and Conde Nast stop promoting tobacco and nicotine to kids with magazines partnering with Philip Morris. Over 50 advocates from 10 countries joined the Campaign for Tobacco-Free Kids in this call.
news.summary: Several popular magazines including Seventeen, Cosmopolitan, and Vogue have formed partnerships with Philip Morris to promote their products IQOS and Zyn. This collaboration has raised concerns among public health advocates and organizations like the Campaign for Tobacco-Free Kids. Over 50 advocates from 10 different countries are urging Hearst Communications Inc. to reconsider these partnerships. The potential impact of this alliance on tobacco usage and public health has sparked a global conversation.

news.headline: SDI Presence reflects on 2024 accomplishments, poised for 2025 success. Grateful to team and customers for support.
news.summary: December 19, 2024 in Chicago marked a vital moment as the year approached its end. Expressing immense gratitude towards the team and customers, reflecting on attained milestones, and anticipating the path forward into 2025 were significant highlights. SDI’s dedication to presence, emphasized by achievements reached and opportunities anticipated, sets the tone for a promising future ahead.

news.headline: Link Labs partners with EasyVote Solutions to integrate asset tracking system with Election Management Platform, Dec 19, 2024.(Characters: 111)
news.summary: Link Labs has recently integrated its advanced real-time asset tracking system into EasyVote's Election Management Platform to enhance and streamline election processes. The integration, implemented on Dec. 19, 2024, at Annapolis, Maryland, marks a significant collaboration between these two tech companies. Link Labs is renowned for its expertise in IoT location services technology, offering precise visibility into assets. This recent development showcases the commitment of both companies to innovation and efficiency in their respective fields.

news.headline: Dodge extending production of 710-hp Durango SRT Hellcat and 5.7-liter HEMI R/T models into 2025 for early holiday sale.
news.summary: In Auburn Hills, Michigan on December 19, 2024, Dodge has surprised everyone by unveiling the Dodge Durango SRT Hellcat as an early holiday gift. This new model boasts a powerful 710-horsepower supercharged 6.2-liter HEMI® Hellcat V-8 engine. Additionally, it was announced that the Durango R/T featuring the 5.7-liter HEMI engine will be continued into the year 2025.

news.headline: 1.5 billion people worldwide currently affected by hearing loss. Local help available in Farmington Hills, Mich.
news.summary: In Farmington Hills, Michigan on December 19, 2024, it was reported that a significant number of individuals are facing hearing loss. Statistics reveal that a staggering 1.5 billion people worldwide are currently impacted by this issue, with nearly 500 million individuals experiencing disability as a result. The International Hearing Society (IHS), serving as the professional hub for addressing such concerns, aims to provide support and guidance in managing hearing-related challenges.

news.headline: Vietnam cement industry to see 3.3% CAGR from 2024-2028, reaching US$4.41 billion output. Steady growth anticipated.
news.summary: An update on the Vietnam Cement Industry Market reveals promising growth projections. The industry is estimated to grow steadily in the coming quarters, with a projected Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 3.3% from 2024 to 2020. The report covers over 50 market segments, including cement products, distribution channels, market share, import-export statistics, and end markets. This data-driven analysis offers valuable insights into the evolving landscape of the cement industry in Vietnam. The comprehensive Databook Q1 2024 Update is now available for review.

news.headline: Position Mobile's future uncertain, could wind up or face buy-out in 2025 trial, per Grand Court ruling.
news.summary: In George Town, Cayman Islands on December 19, 2024, it was reported that on October 29, 2024, a Judge in the Financial Services Division of the Grand Court established a schedule to determine the fate of Position Mobile Ltd SEZC, a collaborative endeavor involving a subsidiary company. The ruling pertains to a decision-making timeline regarding the company's future.

news.headline: The RealReal opens new store in Houston's Montrose Collective, expanding its reach to more customers in the city.
H2O Innovation expands with 22.55 MGD water/wastewater projects in North America, securing new contracts.
news.summary: Quebec City-based H2O Innovation Inc. has recently secured a series of capital equipment projects for its Water Technologies & Services (WTS) division. The company attributes this success to the dedicated efforts of its team and their focus on providing high-quality solutions to clients. Following the completion of the engineering phase, H2O Innovation is pleased to confirm that it has now entered into contracts for the fabrication stage of these projects. This achievement showcases their commitment to delivering exceptional services to their customers.

news.headline: Bitcoin surpasses $100,000 with holders cashing in record profits, market not at peak frenzy yet.
news.summary: The Bitcoin market has not yet reached the unsustainable excitement seen at previous peaks of BTC price surges.

news.headline: XRP price down 9% at $2.26, market cap $129.08B. Ripple CEO remains optimistic, traders anticipate upward rally.
news.summary: Despite a 9% decrease in value, positive sentiment prevails among XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) traders, who are holding positions in anticipation of a potential uptrend. The current price of XRP stands at $2.26 with a market cap of $129.08 billion, signalling an 8.8% drop in the last 24 hours and a 6.3% decline over the past week. In comparison, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is valued at $98,630.61 with a market cap of $1.95 trillion, experiencing a 5.8% decrease in the last day and a 2.8% dip in the last seven days. Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) is priced at $3,474.60 with a market cap of $418.8 billion, noting a 10.5% drop in the last 24 hours and an 11.8% decrease over the past week. Noteworthy trader Javon Marks reminisces on XRP's previous bull cycle, which resulted in a remarkable 600x surge. Marks speculates that XRP could potentially mimic this performance, surging by 6,800% to reach around $168. For further details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Fund with 20-year track record boasts 7.5% income yield from trading options.
BlueTeam employees show dedication in aiding clients affected by Hurricanes Helene and Milton, helping with restoration and repairs.
news.summary: BlueTeam, based in Boca Raton, Florida, is a prominent company specializing in commercial restoration, construction, and roofing services. The firm has acknowledged the exceptional commitment and skill of its staff in aiding clients affected by the recent Hurricanes Helene and Milton. The team efficiently dealt with various issues including minor water infiltrations, intricate roof repairs, replacements, and exterior renovations. Their efforts facilitated the swift restoration of properties, enabling businesses to promptly resume their operations. This company's dedication in helping those affected by the hurricanes demonstrates its expertise in handling such situations.

news.headline: BIS recommends retail CBDC design. Jamaica, Nigeria, China, Sweden, Bahamas, and Peru have CBDC projects in progress.
news.summary: A recent report from the Bank for International Settlements (BIS) has revealed that Jamaica, Nigeria, China, Sweden, the Bahamas, and Peru are all in the process of developing Central Bank Digital Currency (CBDC) programs. These countries are at different stages of advancement in creating their digital currency systems, indicating a growing global trend towards digital financial innovation. The report highlights the increasing importance and adoption of CBDCs worldwide, showcasing the effort and resources being allocated to modernize payment systems and financial infrastructures.

news.headline: Focus Search Partners hires Barbara Haith and Matthew Zoltowski, bolstering interim leadership practice. Nashville, 12/19/24.
news.summary: In Nashville, Tennessee on December 19, 2024, Focus Search Partners, a subsidiary of Vaco specializing in retained search and interim leadership solutions, announced significant growth in its Interim Leadership division. The company welcomed Senior Managing Director Barbara Haith and Managing Director Matthew Zoltowski to enhance its leadership team. This strategic move is expected to further strengthen Focus Search Partners' position in the market.

news.headline: ISS National Lab sponsored over 100 payloads in 2024 to advance R&D in low Earth orbit, enabling discoveries for terrestrial benefit.
news.summary: During the year 2024, the ISS National Lab facilitated the launch of 110 payloads to the International Space Station across seven missions. These missions enabled groundbreaking discoveries with potential applications for Earth. The activities took place at the Kennedy Space Center in Florida.

news.headline: PMRS CEO Timothy Reese wins Chief Investment Officer's 2024 Industry Innovation Award for Pennsylvania Municipal Retirement System.
news.summary: In Harrisburg, Pennsylvania, on December 19, 2024, the Board of Directors of the Pennsylvania Municipal Retirement System (PMRS) revealed that Timothy Reese, both CEO and CIO, was honored with a prestigious award in the investment industry. The recognition came from Chief Investment Officer, a prominent publication, as Reese was named a recipient of the 2024 Industry Innovation Award.

news.headline: 39 counterparties take $112.417b at the Fed reverse repo operation.
TipMeFast, Inc. to acquire graphite mine "La Misa" and gold mines "Rosalia" and "El Tambor" in Mexico, forming Lucent Materials.
news.summary: In Irvine, California, on December 19, 2024, TipMeFast, Inc. (OTC: TMEF) revealed its intention to acquire specific mine assets. The assets include the graphite mine known as "La Misa" and two gold mines - "Rosalia" and "El Tambor," situated in Mexico. This proposed acquisition is outlined in a Letter of Intent (LOI), signaling the company's strategic move to amalgamate these resources. The newly formed subsidiary, Lucent Materials, will oversee these assets. This acquisition aims to capitalize on the escalating demand in the battery materials and precious metals sectors, aligning TipMeFast to meet market needs effectively.

news.headline: Cincinnati's first private social club, The Social House, now open in historic Chase Building.
news.summary: In Cincinnati, The Social House has officially opened its doors on December 19, 2024. Positioned as the city's premier private social club, it provides members with a unique environment focused on fostering connections, encouraging collaboration, and sparking creativity. Situated within the iconic Salmon P. Chase Building, this upscale club offers an exclusive experience for its members.

news.headline: FDA issued new rules for labeling foods as “healthy,” with stricter limits on sugar, sodium, and saturated fat.
news.summary: Final regulations on labeling foods as “healthy” have been issued by the Food and Drug Administration. The rules have been tightened, particularly for sugar, sodium, and saturated fat content. The new guidelines aim to provide more accurate nutritional information to consumers regarding the healthiness of food products.

news.headline: New F.T.C. rule requires hotels, rentals, and ticket sellers to disclose all fees. Effective in a year.
news.summary: Starting next year, hotels, short-term rentals, and event ticket vendors will be required to display the complete price of their services upfront. This new regulation aims to promote transparency and protect consumers. Make sure to watch out for this change to avoid any surprises when booking accommodation or purchasing tickets.

news.headline: Calque and Matador Lending team up to offer trade-in mortgage, allowing homeowners to use home equity for next purchase.
news.summary: Matador Lending, based in Austin, Texas, has announced the adoption of a new lending solution in partnership with Calque. This initiative allows homeowners to utilize their home equity in order to buy their next home. The collaboration between Matador Lending and Calque aims to provide homeowners with opportunities to leverage their assets effectively.

news.headline: Scientific Systems opens new 28,000 sq ft headquarters in Burlington, MA for future growth in AI-powered autonomy.
news.summary: With the grand opening of its new corporate headquarters in Burlington, Massachusetts, Scientific Systems, a top player in AI-powered autonomy for national security, has solidified its position for future growth. The 28,000 square foot facility marks a significant milestone for the company as it expands its operations. The unveiling event held on December 19, 2024 showcased the company's commitment to innovation and advancement in the field.

news.headline: Bitfinex hacker Ilya Lichtenstein confesses to biggest heist, apologizes for stealing/laundering thousands of Bitcoin, seeks redemption.
news.summary: Ilya Lichtenstein, a central figure in the Bitfinex hack saga, and his wife Heather “Razzlekhan” Morgan are making headlines with the recent release of the Netflix documentary, “Biggest Heist Ever.” In a surprising turn of events, Lichtenstein, speaking from jail in a video statement, confessed to his wrongdoings, expressing remorse for his role in hacking Bitfinex, stealing, and laundering thousands of Bitcoin. He acknowledged the gravity of his actions and aimed to dispel any misinformation surrounding the infamous hack. As Lichtenstein plans a future in cybersecurity, Morgan is leveraging her newfound notoriety to venture into entrepreneurship. The documentary's global exposure has prompted Lichtenstein to address his past misdeeds and seek redemption, emphasizing his inability to alter the past while striving to move forward positively.

news.headline: MARA buys $1.5B Bitcoin via convertible notes, miners rush to purchase before prices surge further.
news.summary: As the price of Bitcoin continues to surge, miners are rushing to purchase the cryptocurrency in a bid to capitalize on the upward trend. The competition among miners to acquire Bitcoin before it experiences further rallies is intensifying. This signifies a growing trend within the mining community to invest in Bitcoin amidst its increasing value.

news.headline: FedEx is implementing cost-cutting measures as it faces Q2 pressures, outperforming UPS in 2024.
news.summary: In 2024, FedEx's stock has shown better performance compared to UPS. Although FedEx is currently focused on cost-cutting measures, there is increasing pressure for the company in the second quarter.

news.headline: Analyst: Uber stock sell-off creates buying opportunity amid concerns over Waymo and Tesla; Oppenheimer sees positive outlook.
news.summary: A recent sell-off in Uber stock has been identified as a buying opportunity by an analyst from Oppenheimer. Despite concerns over Waymo and Tesla's Robotaxi impacting the ride-hail market leader, the analyst remains optimistic about the future prospects of Uber. This development was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: C3.ai stock downgraded by KeyBanc analysts citing revenue growth concerns, leading to drop in stock price.
news.summary: KeyBanc analysts downgraded C3.ai stock due to concerns regarding revenue growth at the AI software company. This news led to a drop in the stock price. The downgrade was based on worries about the company's ability to generate revenue.

news.headline: Tencent stock rises after early AI talks with Apple, Baidu stock falls. Talks reported to be in early stage - Reuters.
news.summary: According to reports from Reuters, discussions between Tencent and Apple regarding artificial intelligence technology are at a preliminary stage. Following this news, Tencent's stock experienced gains, while Baidu's stock saw a decline. The article was featured on Investor's Business Daily.
